Go Fleeting+
Fleeting+ · member perks

One perk pays
for the month.

Standing deals at the places we cover — negotiated so the membership beats itself. Use any one perk, once, and the $7 month is covered. Everything after that is you coming out ahead.

A full board like this, each perk used once a week or so: worth $122+ a month. Fleeting+ is $7.
The board

Standing member deals.

Not coupons, not one-offs — always-on perks a member can use every week. Coffee to cocktails, East Nash to Franklin.

FLEETING+
TICKETS · Citywide
Every sell-out show in town

FIRST DIBS

Live "tickets are ON SALE" alerts the moment the on-sale opens - before the free list, before the sell-out.

Fires straight to your phone. Steeplechase, CMA Fest, the Grand Prix.

Arming now — first alerts this season.

FLEETING+
COFFEE · Germantown · Mon-Fri
Your coffee bar

TWO FOR ONE

Buy one pour, the second is on the house. Weekday mornings.

Show the current issue at the register.

worth ~$5 a visit

THIS SPACE

A standing deal here reaches every Fleeting member, in the issue and on this board, every week. Costs you a slow Tuesday.

Cards stamped SAMPLE show the shape of the deals we negotiate — the founding board is signing now, and samples are not live offers. Live cards replace them one by one, and we publish the running member-savings tally right here.

How it works

Show up, say the word, save.

1

Go Fleeting+

$7 a month. Full calendar, early alerts, and every deal on this board.

2

Show the issue

At the counter or when you book: show the current issue or say "Fleeting sent me." That's the whole mechanic.

3

The venue tallies

Every redemption is counted — it keeps the deals honest, and it's how we prove to venues the board fills seats.

★ ★ ★

$7 a month. Covered by breakfast.

The free weekly list is always free. Fleeting+ is the full calendar, first-dibs ticket alerts, and every perk above — a membership built to pay for itself the first time you use it.

Go Fleeting+ →

Cancel anytime. If the board isn't worth more than $7 to you, we haven't done our job.

For venues

Get on the board.

One standing deal — a free app on weeknights, a member hour, ten percent off — costs you nothing on a slow Tuesday, fills seats, and we send you the redemption count. No invoice, pull it anytime.

Put your deal on the board →
